optimization_backlog.title: INSERT RETURNING in WorkItemStore::create
optimization_backlog.notes: Last remaining INSERT+last_insert_rowid() in the codebase. Replaces with INSERT RETURNING via get_result::<WorkItemRow>(conn). 290 tests pass.

optimization_backlog.title: Cache recent session history in memory
optimization_backlog.notes: load_history() hits SQLite on every Goose agent invocation. An LRU cache per session would avoid repeated reads. Requires more significant code change and thread-safety considerations. dashmap already in workspace deps.

perf_notes: Full workspace build downloads goose from GitHub (network blocked). Use -p opengoose-persistence for local work.
SQLite synchronous=NORMAL in WAL mode is safe and ~12x faster for per-commit writes. PR #39 merged.
libsqlite3-sys with bundled feature - SQLite version is bundled, no system SQLite dependency.
Criterion benchmarks baselines (in-memory WAL): append_message ~15-16µs, get_active_team ~1µs, load_history(10) ~6µs, load_history(50) ~28µs, set_active_team ~9µs.
In-memory SQLite doesn't show mmap benefit - file-based workloads gain from mmap_size on repeated page reads.
conn.transaction() requires PersistenceError: From<diesel::result::Error> which is already implemented.
returning_clauses_for_sqlite_3_35 feature already in workspace - INSERT RETURNING works and is used widely.
As of 2026-03-13, all INSERT+last_insert_rowid() patterns in persistence crate have been replaced with INSERT RETURNING.
Next opportunity: in-memory LRU cache for load_history() - dashmap is available in workspace.
